HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[principals] Mapping visible principals, identity footholds, and follow-on candidates.
ho-azure principals

╭───────────────────────────────┬──────────────────┬─────────────┬─────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┬─────────╮
│ principal                     │ type             │ roles       │ assignments │ identity context                                                      │ sources                        │ current │
├───────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┼─────────────┼─────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────┼─────────┤
│ azurefox-lab-sp               │ ServicePrincipal │ Owner       │ 1           │ names=ua-app; types=userAssigned; attached=1                          │ rbac;whoami;managed-identities │ yes     │
│ operator@lab.local            │ User             │ Reader      │ 1           │ none                                                                  │ rbac                           │ no      │
│ func-orders-system            │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=func-orders-system; types=systemAssigned; attached=1            │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ app-empty-mi-system           │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=app-empty-mi-system; types=systemAssigned; attached=1           │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ vmss-edge-01-system           │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=vmss-edge-01-system; types=systemAssigned; attached=1           │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ la-inbound-redeploy-identity  │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=la-inbound-redeploy-identity; types=systemAssigned; attached=1  │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ ua-workflow-router            │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=ua-workflow-router; types=userAssigned; attached=1              │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ ml-ops-hub-workspace-identity │ ServicePrincipal │ Contributor │ 1           │ names=ml-ops-hub-workspace-identity; types=systemAssigned; attached=1 │ managed-identities             │ no      │
│ ua-ml-ops                     │ ServicePrincipal │ Owner       │ 1           │ names=ua-ml-ops; types=userAssigned; attached=1                       │ managed-identities             │ no      │
╰───────────────────────────────┴──────────────────┴─────────────┴─────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┴─────────╯

Takeaway: 9 principals visible; 2 hold Owner and 1 match the current identity.
